drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T1(f1 == true, $b0_0_0 : f1)
    accumulate( T0(f2 != $b0_0_0); $a0_1 : count() )
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -2
when
    T0(f2 == false, $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f1)
    not T2()
    not T1(f1 != false, f1 == true)
then
    insertLogical(new T2(""));
end
rule "R2"
no-loop
when
    ( T1() and exists T2(f0 contains "ph" || f0 in ("b", "a") || !(f0 contains "b")) and not T0(f2 != true, f0 != -4) )
    or
    ( T1() and exists T2(f0 contains "a") and not T0(f1 < -1000000007, f0 not in (-3, 10, 12)) )
    or
    ( T1() and exists T2(f0 contains "ph" || f0 in ("b", "a") || !(f0 contains "b")) and not T0(f1 >= 0, f0 in (100, 9)) )
then
    insertLogical(new T2("a"));
end
rule "R3"
salience 8
when
    $p3_0 : T2(f0 contains "ph", !(f0 contains "ph"), $b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f0)
then
    delete($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
when
    T2(f0 contains "zz", f0 <= "alpha", $b4_0_0 : f0, $b4_0_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    T2(f0 contains "z", f0 < "zz", $b5_0_0 : f0, $b5_0_1 : f0)
then
end
